title: ulex baeticus
intro: Ulex baeticus, also known as the Andalusian gorse or Spanish furze, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ulex baeticus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Ulex baeticus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in some traditional recipes and folk remedies.
